issue_title: Fix special characters in artist name
issue_body_preview:
Replaced nodetools.en/decodeURL with en/decodeURIComponent to encode URL allowed characters ( /?:@&=+$# ) - fixes issue with artist names such as AC/DC

Added codedArtistName to listAlbums function as this was missing

see [https://volumio.org/forum/album-view-not-converting-characters-t6989.htm
test_description_zh: 在音乐库中浏览包含特殊字符的艺术家（如 AC/DC），点击该艺术家名称进入专辑视图，观察专辑列表是否正常加载显示。
expected_result_zh: 点击含有特殊字符（如 / ? : @ & = + $ # 等）的艺术家名称后，应正确导航到该艺术家的专辑列表页面，专辑列表正常加载并完整显示，不出现页面报错、空白或无法加载的情况。
